THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDONALD, FRANK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 525 O'FARRELL STREET #201, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,724.74 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,724.74, STAYED UNTIL MAY-21-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES PRIOR TO 5/21/97, PLTF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT & DAMAGES; AND MOVE TO VACATE JUDGMNT & DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES.
